descs.genUploadsFolder.py: The script that generated this page
descs./generators/Generate_PageTemplate.py: This script generates a new basic page for the site.
descs./generators/Generate_BlogPost.py: This script generates a new blogpost for the blog post page.
descs./js/siteScript.js: This is the main site script, made with Haxe!
descs./js/Store.js: This script is for storing cookies, mainly whether you supported the site.
descs./js/PyFileViewer.js: This script is used in vschar-official.com/viewfile and checks for ?doc= and shows a file with that path in the div that has the id of 'pyViewer'
descs.hxCodec.zip: This is an archive of my copy of hxCodec 2.5.1, for a Github Issue.
descs./js/AddFooter.js: This saves me the hassle of re-adding, and updating the footer that appears at the bottom of most pages, including this one!
descs./css/backgrounds/main.png: The default page background for /css/vschar-style.css | VS Char Loading Screen (OLD)
